allow: Bash(vai issue create --title "Version detail page — missing data, broken timestamps, empty diffs" --body 'Multiple issues on the version detail page after the id fix::*)
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "DELETE FROM workspaces WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND status = ''Created''")
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "UPDATE issues SET status = ''open'' WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND status = ''in_progress'' RETURNING title")

Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "UPDATE issues SET status = ''closed'', resolution = ''wontfix'' WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND title LIKE ''%related issues linking%''")
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "SELECT id, event_type FROM events WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND id = 2")

Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "SELECT id, event_type FROM events WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND event_type = ''MergeCompleted'' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5")
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "DELETE FROM workspaces WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND status IN \(''Created'', ''Active''\)")
